name: vthreshold
summary: threshold for interpreting LRUD readings as left-right-front-back reading perpendicular to the shot. If passages are horizontal (inclination < vthreshold), LR is perpendicular to the shot and UD is vertical. If passages are more or less vertical (inclination > vthreshold), even UD becomes perpendicular to the shot -- otherwise passages would not look very good. In the case of vertical shots, UD is interpreted as north-south dimension from the station to allow tube-like modeling of verticals.
